approvalStep.description: Reference example for issue #125. Approval is assigned to the record owner's manager -- adjust to whatever assignedApprover fits your org (a queue, a named user, a role) before activating. This is a demo entry point: Revenant does not care how the approver is chosen, only that the process's final actions land on Approval_Status__c.
approvalStep.label: Manager Approval
approvalStep.name: Manager_Approval

ApprovalProcess.description: Reference example for issue #125: demonstrates bridging a native Approval Process (least-privilege approver inbox, mobile approve/reject, delegation -- all native, no Revenant code) to the durable NativeApprovalWorkflowExample workflow. Ships inactive as all Approval Processes do; activate after adjusting the approver assignment for your org. Final actions only flip Approval_Status__c -- Revenant_Approval_Decision_To_Signal_Example.flow-meta.xml reacts to that change and publishes the Approve: signal that resumes the suspended workflow.
ApprovalProcess.label: Revenant Native Approval Example
